name: solo-claude
description: Skills for solo developers and small teams on a monorepo with GitHub Issues and in-repo docs. Seventeen skills: code-review, release-notes, documentation-check, docs-update, repo-audit, repo-verifier, docs-author, github-issue-creator, github-issue-implementer, workflow-hygiene-check, scaffold-repo-meta, decision-ledger, plus the planning chain (requirements-intake, package-context-scan, solution-design, delivery-plan) and the plan-new-work orchestrator. Ships a CLAUDE.md template and the GitHub MCP endpoint.
